name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Sign your name to fight for fair voting rights:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Protect the right to vote. | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI3Nzk2NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgwMzkyNDI3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Friend --

Today, I went to Texas to talk about my vision for fair voting rights for every American -- sadly, our current reality falls far short of this fundamental ideal.

The right to vote is under attack -- especially the rights of young people, poor people, and people of color. Here in Texas, you can use your concealed weapon permit to vote, but not your student ID.

**[This kind of disparity doesn't happen by accident, and I'm going to do something about it. Let's send a message that we won't stand for this brutal undermining of the right to vote: Sign your name right now to support equal voting rights for every American.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI3Nzk2NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgwMzkyNDI3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Our nation has a long history of brave men and women fighting to expand access to the polls -- we can't let those fights be undone by elected officials acting out of fear and self-interest.

**Making it harder for Americans to vote is just wrong, and counter to the values we share. If you 're as outraged as I am, add your name right now to fight for fair voting rights for all:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/voting-rights/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI3Nzk2NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgwMzkyNDI3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thank you,

Hillary
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI3Nzk2NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgwMzkyNDI3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI3Nzk2NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgwMzkyNDI3S0&mt=1&rt=0).
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI3Nzk2NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgwMzkyNDI3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
clean_body: Protect the right to vote. | Friend -- Today, I went to Texas to talk about my vision for fair voting rights for every American -- sadly, our current reality falls far short of this fundamental ideal. The right to vote is under attack -- especially the rights of young people, poor people, and people of color. Here in Texas, you can use your concealed weapon permit to vote, but not your student ID. Our nation has a long history of brave men and women fighting to expand access to the polls -- we can't let those fights be undone by elected officials acting out of fear and self-interest. Making it harder for Americans to vote is just wrong, and counter to the values we share. If you 're as outraged as I am, add your name right now to fight for fair voting rights for all: Thank you, Hillary | | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: I'm not kidding
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

"Defeat the Washington Machine" isn't just a campaign slogan.

It's a fight I'm committed to, and I've earned the scars to prove it.

When they spy state apologists in Congress schemed to ram through an extension of the bulk data collection program, I filibustered on the Senate floor for ten-and-a-half-hours to block it.

I remained on the Senate floor until the early hours of the morning to object to every proposed short-term extension of illegal domestic spying.

**[My campaign released has a new ad about my stand against illegal domestic spying, and with new polls showing me tied for the lead with Republican primary voters, I'm counting on your support to run this ad in the crucial early states](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28228867:27126025865:m:1:879035888:F2E5085CB2C838A5364CB0FE57A0A0B7:r)**.

Fellow Conservative, in my showdown with President Obama over NSA spying last Sunday I REFUSED to give an inch.

Not when I was attacked in the press.

Not when I was pressured behind closed doors with the establishment of BOTH parties lined up against me.

And not when the senior senator from Arizona claimed I was staging a "campaign stunt."

But when I forced President Obama's illegal NSA spying to expire, I proved defending the Bill of Rights is how you score victories against the Washington Machine.

My stand was an important step to ending illegal domestic spying for good.

Fellow Conservative, the American people are demanding a President who will defend the Bill of Rights and who won't bend to the whims of the establishment no matter what pressure the Washington Machine brings to bear.

That's why newly released polls show Hillary Clinton's approval numbers PLUMMETING.

It's why the only candidate who fares worse is the Republican establishment's so-called "electable" pick.

It's why I'm tied for first with Republican primary voters.

I lead Hillary Clinton in head-to-head matchups in key swing states like Colorado, Iowa, New Hampshire, and Pennsylvania.

And national polls continue to show I'm the Republican best positioned to defeat her.

A new NBC Wall Street journal poll shows me leading Hillary Clinton 45% to 37% with independents.

This week, my campaign released a new TV ad about my NSA spying showdown with President Obama.

**[Will you help me get this ad in front of as many voters in the early caucus and primary states by chipping in a contribution of $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28228867:27126025865:m:1:879035888:F2E5085CB2C838A5364CB0FE57A0A0B7:r)**?

With your support, I can spread my message that my stand for the Bill of Rights in how you defeat Hillary Clinton and the Washington Machine.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28228868:27126025865:m:1:879035888:F2E5085CB2C838A5364CB0FE57A0A0B7:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28228869:27126025865:m:1:879035888:F2E5085CB2C838A5364CB0FE57A0A0B7:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28228870:27126025865:m:1:879035888:F2E5085CB2C838A5364CB0FE57A0A0B7:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28228871:27126025865:m:1:879035888:F2E5085CB2C838A5364CB0FE57A0A0B7:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28228867:27126025865:m:1:879035888:F2E5085CB2C838A5364CB0FE57A0A0B7:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28228867:27126025865:m:1:879035888:F2E5085CB2C838A5364CB0FE57A0A0B7:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28228872:27126025865:m:1:879035888:F2E5085CB2C838A5364CB0FE57A0A0B7:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28228873:27126025865:m:1:879035888:F2E5085CB2C838A5364CB0FE57A0A0B7:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28228874:27126025865:m:1:879035888:F2E5085CB2C838A5364CB0FE57A0A0B7:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Team Jeb
subject: Thank you for signing up!
body:
Peter,

Thank you for signing up.

In the meantime, keep an eye out on [**Twitter**](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-101064824-1243-0-142492-1450367-f161fae393-639b14c277), [**Facebook**](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-101064824-1243-0-142492-1450368-f8fe508b82-639b14c277), and [**Instagram**](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-101064824-1243-0-142492-1450369-4f7683a2b1-639b14c277) for more updates.

We hope to see you in Miami on June 15.

Team Jeb
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc.
PO Box 440641
Miami, FL 33144

name: Bernie 2016
subject: Petition to the Democratic Party
body:
#
Team -
More than 90,000 people have signed our petition asking the Democratic Party to host more presidential debates starting this summer. Voters shouldn't wait to hear candidates debate the very serious issues facing our country.
**[Can you help us get to 100,000 signatures?](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2141/43f17890/5ea121dd/621dc77d/122940689/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/debates?source=em150605c")**
**[Click here to sign the petition to start the presidential debates.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2141/43f17890/5ea121dd/621dc77d/122940689/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/debates?source=em150605c")**
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2141/43f17890/5ea121dd/621dc77d/122940689/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/debates?source=em150605c")

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2141/43f17890/5ea121dd/621dc77d/122940689/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/debates?source=em150605c")
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2141/43f17890/5ea121dd/621dc77a/122940689/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/summer-debates?refcode=emb150605b")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but if you'd like to, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2141/43f17890/5ea121dd/621dc77b/122940689/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2141/43f17890/5ea121dd/621dc778/122940689/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Terry Sullivan, MarcoRubio.com
subject: NY Times Uncovers #RubioCrimeSpree
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Peter,
The Hillary Clinton machine and the New York Times have
teamed up to run a story on a huge scandal...
Marco has had 4 traffic tickets in the last 20 years!!!
The Times really went into overdrive searching for these kind
of "scandals" in Marco's rearview mirror.
We know it's one scandal Hillary Clinton doesn't have to
worry about since it's been nearly that long since she's driven a
car herself.
But this campaign is about the future and we're looking down
the road. Marco's campaign is about something bigger: a vision
for our future.
If the press is going to park its attention on silly stories
like this one, we have to pass them and talk directly to voters.
Click here to donate now to help Marco get his message
straight to voters.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42378935:17421068237:m:3:1349778030:8F419FAFC9844999BCC40A71A5FC1270:r

Terry Sullivan
Campaign Manager
Marco Rubio for President

Paid for by Marco Rubio for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system March 30, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:

[ **https://www.hillaryclinton.com/your-chance-to-meet-hillary/**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI3ODYxNDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgwNDc3Mzc2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
| Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 5/11/15 and 5/28/15 or 5/29/15 and 6/7/15. Enter by contributing [**here**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI3ODYxNDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgwNDc3Mzc2S0&mt=1&rt=0) or click [https://www.hillaryclinton.com/meet-hillary/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjI3ODYxNDES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgwNDc3Mzc2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without contributing. Two winners will receive a special invitation to a campaign event with Hillary Clinton, round trip tickets for winners to event from within the 50 U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico, two nights hotel accommodations (approx. retail value of all prizes $4000).
